output: T1 audit completed. `_ensure_verification_task(payload: dict, state: dict) -> None` is called only from `_write_finalize_artifacts(plan_dir: Path, payload: dict[str, Any], state: PlanState) -> str`, so test-baseline data does not flow in today and will need explicit wiring at that call site or by enriching `payload` before finalize write. The exact `all tests pass` string is not in `prompts/execute.py`; the live scope-creep text is in `handlers.py`: `If any test fails, read the error, fix the code, and re-run until all tests pass.` Default review uses Codex with `--full-auto`, so it can run commands; Claude review does not get execute-style permission bypass. Finalize artifacts live under `.megaplan/plans/<plan_name>/` and finalize currently writes `finalize.json`, `finalize_snapshot.json`, and `final.md` there. There is no repo-local `config.py`; runtime config is global JSON at `~/.config/megaplan/config.json` or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/megaplan/config.json`, loaded by `_core.io.load_config()` with defaults from `types.DEFAULTS`. Existing test modules under `tests/` are `test_checks.py`, `test_config.py`, `test_core.py`, `test_evaluation.py`, `test_handle_review_robustness.py`, `test_io_git_patch.py`, `test_loop.py`, `test_megaplan.py`, `test_parallel_critique.py`, `test_parallel_review.py`, `test_prompts.py`, `test_quality.py`, `test_review_checks.py`, `test_review_mechanical.py`, `test_schemas.py`, `test_swe_bench.py`, `test_tiny_robustness.py`, and `test_workers.py`.
commands_run: rg -n "all tests pass|re-run until all tests pass|All existing tests pass" .
rg -n "tests pass|test suite ran green|all existing tests pass|existing test suite|Do NOT create new test files|re-run until all tests pass|verify the changes work|run the full test file/module" .

task_updates.executor_notes: Audited the live finalize and verification flow and confirmed the main scope-creep mechanism is handler-injected verification text. `_ensure_verification_task(payload: dict, state: dict) -> None` is called only from `_write_finalize_artifacts(plan_dir, payload, state)`, so baseline data will need explicit wiring there; `prompts/execute.py` does not contain a literal `all tests pass` string, while `handlers.py` does. I also verified that default Codex review runs with `--full-auto`, finalize artifacts are written directly under `.megaplan/plans/<plan_name>/`, `validate_execution_evidence()` currently audits git/evidence quality rather than test outcomes, and config today comes from global JSON config plus `types.DEFAULTS`, with no finalize-specific settings yet.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed all requested audit points: `_ensure_verification_task(payload: dict, state: dict) -> None` and its sole call site in `_write_finalize_artifacts(...)`; the actual `all tests pass` text lives in `handlers.py`, not `prompts/execute.py`; default Codex review can run commands via `--full-auto`; finalize artifacts use `.megaplan/plans/<plan_name>/...`; and config is the global JSON config loaded by `_core.io.load_config()` with defaults in `types.DEFAULTS`.
